name: WAKE CUP! Mocha
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＷＡＫＥ ＣＵＰ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウェイカップ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>！ モカ
desc: Once per turn, during your End Phase: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. You can only use each of the following effects of "WAKE CUP! Mocha" once per turn. You can target 1 face-down Defense Position monster on the field; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, change that monster to Attack Position. If this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 1000 ATK, but send it to the GY during the End Phase.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your End Phase: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. You can only use each of the following effects of "WAKE CUP! Mocha" once per turn. You can target 1 face-down Defense Position monster on the field; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, change that monster to Attack Position. If this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 1000 ATK, but send it to the GY during the End Phase.

misc: Flip monster without a Flip effect
